description:
Operating Area: Turkey

Getaway is one of the best sailing yachts available for charter in the Eastern Mediterranean and offers great value for money. She offers tremendous amount of exterior space as result of her wide beam, uncluttered forward deck and conveniently large flybridge. Size of the cabins equal those found on much larger yachts and consist of one very large master cabin with a California King size bed and three other double guests cabins. The flexibility to convert the two twin cabins into King bed configurations make this vessel an ideal option for four couples or families with children. Light colour interior, all around windows in the saloon and natural light from the skylight in the corridor provides a very modern airy atmosphere. Comfortable dining is possible in the aft deck, salon and flybridge. All cabins and the salon are equipped with TVs and entertainment systems but there is even a fold down TV in the aft section to allow guests to enjoy their favourite programs al-fresco. There are plenty of games and water sports available on board to be enjoyed throughout a charter. The yacht performs very well under sail, meaning her guests can not only enjoy her modern comforts but also the wonderful feeling of gliding through the turquoise waters of the Med.

blueprint.name: GETAWAY

amenities.label: Satellite TV in Saloon, Aft Deck and in all Cabins
DVD/CD Player in Saloon and in all Cabins

entertainment: Satellite TV in Saloon, Aft Deck and all Cabins
DVD/CD Player in Saloon and in all Cabins

crew.name: Adem Türk
crew.bio: Captain Adem started his yachting career in 1998 and has been working on charter yachts ever since. He was promoted to Getaway in 2015 by the same management team that he has worked with since 2006. He knows the Southern coast of Turkey like the back of his hand and enjoys sharing this turquoise paradise with his guests. He is warm, funny and detailed in his work. With his knowledge and experience, Adem delivers a memorable and safe vacation to all his guests. He is married and has two beautiful daughters. Adem speaks Turkish, English and beginner German.

crew.name: Fatih Aydın
crew.bio: Fatih was born in Fethiye in 1993. Before he started working on yachts in 2017 he worked for several years in high-end beachside restaurants in Gocek.  Keeping himself up to date with new styles and techniques, he loves to share Turkish and Med cuisine with his guests and spoils them with fresh bakes during breakfast. Fatih maintains a good relationship with both guests and crew, thanks to his sense of humour and modest personality. Fatih speaks Turkish.

crew.name: Mahsum Çeri
crew.bio: Mahsum was raised in Muğla but was born in Mardin, located in the southeastern province of Turkey. He gathered several years of high-end restaurant experience before becoming the steward on Getaway in 2018. With his easy-going personality and attentiveness, he endeavors to make our guest’s stay onboard relaxed and enjoyable.  He is a keen reader and likes to listen to music in his spare time. Mahsum speaks Turkish and English.

crew.name: Ramazan Türk
crew.bio: Ramazan is from the small Mediterranean village of Ekincik. He started his career as a captain’s assistant on river boats along the Dalyan River before he moved on to luxury charter vessels as a deckhand in 2010. He was promoted to Getaway in 2015 where he is now in charge of all deck duties. He is an asset to the crew with his knowledge of the coastline and his seamanship skills. His hobbies include swimming and he is a keen fisherman. Ramazan speaks Turkish and beginner level English.

crew.name: Oruç Aydın
crew.bio: Oruç is the youngest member of the crew, born in the small Mediterranean town of Ortaca in 2007.  Currently completing his internship, he will graduate from college as an experienced and valued member of our crew.  During his time onboard Getaway, he is always eager to learn and exhibits a great work ethic.  It has to be said, one of his most endearing features is his lovely smile.

pricingInfo.name: Daily Charter Rates: April / May / October / November
